content.en:
The territory of Eastern Ukraine, the most prosperous territory.

This is the territory of the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

On this day, a powerful realm god rushed here from all over the Dongwu realm and entered the Dongwu Ancient City of the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

After Ye Tian came here, he was arranged to live and wait for the representatives of the realm gods of other powerful forces to come over, and then have a meeting together.

It didn't take long for representatives of all the powerful forces, the top forces, to come.

......

In a glorious hall, a Venerable Realm God sat here, and Ye Tian sat in a slightly remote position.

After all, the human race is just an ordinary powerful force, and he doesn't have much fame, so the Dongwu Ancient Sect naturally doesn't pay much attention to him.

Soon, a high-level realm god of the Dongwu Ancient Sect came.

"I've seen the gods of the Guya Realm!"

The gods of the realm said respectfully.

This Guya Realm God is a high-level realm god who has condensed nine Eternal Realm Spirits, and his combat power is extremely powerful, and the sound of the entire Dongwu Realm domain is very loud.

The Guya Realm God spoke: "Fellow Realm Gods, this time there is an important matter to discuss by convening all the powerful forces and top forces in the entire Dongwu Realm. "

The important thing?

The top forces knew, but the powerful forces didn't know what was going on, and they were still wondering.

The Guya Realm God continued: "You should know that the Demon Seed Abyss invaded our Realm God Realm before, and in fact, we still suffered a loss in that battle. And the war has never ended, of course, it has nothing to do with your powerful forces, and you are not qualified to participate. "

"But this time, more than a dozen of our top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm have suffered great losses in one battlefield, plus that battlefield only allows middle-level cultivators in the Eternal Realm God Realm to enter, if a high-level realm god enters, his strength will be suppressed very much, and there is a possibility of being besieged and killed by a middle-level demon seed. "

"In order to recover the losses, more than a dozen of our top forces allow your powerful forces to participate~. "

When these words were spoken, these powerful forces were not excited, but worried.

After all, if you get involved, you will have to send a middle-level realm god in, and you will probably suffer heavy losses!

The gods of the Ancient Realm knew what these powerful forces were thinking, so they said, "Don't think this is a bad thing. That battlefield is a treasure land, otherwise, a dozen of our top forces would not have been involved. Why is the top force so strong, it can give birth to high-level realm gods, this treasure land has a certain role. There are treasure resources that can assist in condensing the spirit of the Eternal Realm, and there are even treasure resources that can quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed. For example, the Extreme Yang Blood Gold that you all want!"

"What, there's the Extreme Yang Blood Gold ??? there"

Many mid-level realm gods were shocked.

Extreme Yang Blood Gold is one of the resources that can quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed of the Middle Rank Realm God, this resource has always been in the hands of the top forces, and only one or two pieces are occasionally revealed, but it still makes many powerful forces compete wildly.

It can be said that the Extreme Yang Blood Gold is enough to make them desperate!

Lord Guya Realm God, I, Jiuli Sect, am willing to participate!

A middle-level realm god representative of the Nine Glass Sect said.

The Nine Glass Sect is a powerful force, but it can be called the top among the powerful forces, because there are dozens of middle-level realm gods in the Nine Glass Sect, among which there are five middle-level peak realm gods in the Eternal Realm God Realm.

It can be said that the strength of the Nine Glass Sect is very close to the top forces.

But for countless years, the Nine Glass Sect has not become a top force, and there is not even any hope.

So, this opportunity, they must seize.

"The Ice Alliance is willing to join!"

"The Star Universe Holy Gate is willing to join!"

"Momen is willing to join!"

All powerful forces chose to join, and Ye Tian was naturally willing to join.

However, not all powerful forces are willing to join.

There are some powerful forces, whose strength has barely reached the level of a powerful force, and there are not a few mid-level realm gods, and they are all weak, once they fall, they will immediately fall from the powerful forces, and it will not be worth it.

Therefore, these powerful forces chose to give up.

Soon.

Ye Tian finally knew what kind of place this battlefield was. []

【The Boundary of the Seam!】

The Boundary of the Boundary Rift is the intersection of the Eternal Realm, the Realm of the Realm of the Gods and the Demon Seed Abyss, where a large number of Boundary Rift Realms have been born, and it also contains countless resources, and it is also a treasure land for the top forces to compete for.

Basically, each realm corresponds to a boundary rift boundary, and forces like the Eastern Wu realm are not allowed to enter other boundary rift boundaries.

The top-level Boundary Gap Realm does not limit the strength of high-level realm gods and high-level demon seeds, but the realm of this boundary crack in which the Dongwu Realm participates is relatively weak, and it does not suppress the strength of middle-level realm gods, but it suppresses high-level realm gods and high-level demon seeds.

And this boundary of the seam is also named the boundary of the East Wu boundary by the East Wu boundary.

Every top force has an entrance to the Crack Realm of the Eastern Wu Realm, but this time, the top forces such as the Eastern Wu Ancient Sect will rebuild an entrance somewhere in the Eastern Wu Realm, allowing other powerful forces to enter.

Soon.

These powerful forces all left, but the Guya Realm Gods of the Eastern Wu Ancient Sect and the high-level Realm Gods of the other top forces did not leave.

"'Guya Realm God, these powerful forces are involved, I don't know if they can reverse the weakness. "

"If it can't be reversed, then you can only ask the Boundary Court Headquarters to ask for help from other realms, but you can't do it unless you have to, otherwise it will be too embarrassing!"

"Let these powerful forces take it first, it's really not possible, and then ask for help. No matter how much you lose face, you can't lose a boundary rift. "

......

The holy (king's) kingdom of the human race.

After Ye Tian came back, he waited for news from the Dongwu Ancient Sect, and once the entrance to the Dongwu Boundary Seam was built, he would immediately go over.

After a period of time, news came from the Dongwu Ancient Sect that the entrance had been built.

"Gotta pass!"

Ye Tian immediately went over, and it didn't take long for him to arrive at the entrance of the East Wu Realm Seam Realm.

At this time, many middle-level realm gods had already arrived here, but they did not enter immediately, but prepared to wait for the arrival of other realm gods before entering together.

"Let's all go in!"

Ye Tian and other realm gods shuttled in one after another.

Once inside, they found themselves in an ancient city.

This ancient city has built countless formations, and it should be the base camp of more than a dozen top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm.

......
